name: Yes Dashii
author: ivaaanma
bootlegger: Before each game the Storyteller rolls a D20. 1-15, the Amnesiac gets a random ability. 16-20, the Amnesiac becomes the Yes Dashii.
Yes Dashii: Each night*, choose a player. If they are the Demon, their living neighbors become permanently sober and healthy.
If the Amnesiac becomes poisoned/drunk: the Yes Dashii effect ceases.
If the Demon changes: the protected neighbors update to match the current Demon.
If the Demon resurrects/transfers: the effect follows the active Demon.
